textByHashes.7c3eebe6a3785b136f31ff699ad2001267b768a0: Hello there! You're the one sorting out the peace talks, right?
textByHashes.9c213c00a002762a9aeabdfd0c741a2d327327b6: Hello there! Have you heard about the election? Isn't it thrilling?
textByHashes.12e90d97fcfb86dc5b960824dddf232acb403836: Well I really could do with a bit of a rest, not to mention the fact that I'm starving. Still, the lily pads are our duty. It would be wrong of us to let someone else touch them.
textByHashes.1fd6f9f4a11cd28e278428be8e5063afe4517e78: Yeah most people think we just eat flies. We do, and we love them, but sometimes you find that you've just had enough flies and fancy something more exotic.
textByHashes.a673b424d5e6f2f7e4014ca97a5dd0b1c2baaf30: Just a shame we can't reach those ones...
textByHashes.2b203aee1b9e48dc49b1c16c2b924361b2ab46ca: Can't stop to talk! There's oranges to be had!
textByHashes.ad80aa1e9211f0f5fa9c73046a744547c2c8e623: Can you believe Cuthbert died? Such a shame.
textByHashes.f142e149effd20a8de95b25470dabf3ed1cf49c7: I hear the peace talks are going well. We might be close to ending the conflict with that nasty human.
textByHashes.7060a2a665be383cf0d2bc6c9f5745a0f086eede: Today is a good day to be a frog!
